tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT pr.id AS pr_number, pr.closes_linear AS linear_issue_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM github_pull_requests pr2 JOIN linear_issues li2 ON pr2.closes_linear = li2.id WHERE pr2.state = 'merged' AND li2.state != 'done') AS total_count FROM github_pull_requests pr JOIN linear_issues li ON pr.closes_linear = li.id WHERE pr.state = 'merged' AND li.state != 'done';","params":[]}
